title: Wolves
description: Adds different wolf texture variations from the 24W10A snapshot to the game
body:
- ## What is this?
> This resource pack adds different variations of wolf textures depending on which biome it appeared in.

- ## ⚠️ Warning
> These textures use `Optifine` technology. So if you don't want to use `Optifine` or you are using [**Sodium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) you will need to install the [**Entity Texture Features**](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) mod for the resource pack to work.

- ## 🎨 Types and spawn of wolves
> | Name | Spawn | Biome_name |
> |---------------------|:---------------------:|---------------------:|
> | Rusty wolf | Jungle | minecraft:sparse_jungle |
> | Spotted wolf | Savanna plateau | minecraft:savanna_plateau |
> | Black wolf | Old growth pine taiga | minecraft:old_growth_pine_taiga |
> | Striped wolf | Wooded badlands | minecraft:wooded_badlands |
> | Snowy wolf | Snowy groves | minecraft:snowy_slopes |
> | Ashen wolf | Snowy taiga | minecraft:snowy_taiga |
> | Woods wolf | Forest | minecraft:forest |
> | Chestnut wolf | Old growth spruce taiga | minecraft:old_growth_spruce_taiga |

> [**More info**](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/article/new-minecraft-wolves)

- ## ❗ Note
> During development I found that the wolf texture can reset if the wolf for example with a jungle color texture will be for example in the taiga and you restart from the world, then his texture color will reset.
